task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status labels list or settings page showing the label 'Destroyed - Verified' with its type set to 'Archived'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the status of assets HD-DISP-001, HD-DISP-002, HD-DISP-003, and HD-DISP-004 is updated to 'Destroyed - Verified'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset list or individual asset pages showing the status 'Destroyed - Verified' specifically for the four target assets.

task_completion.description: Verify that the document 'Certificate_of_Destruction_Q3.pdf' is uploaded to the records of HD-DISP-001, HD-DISP-002, HD-DISP-003, and HD-DISP-004.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for file attachment sections in the asset records or an activity log showing 'Certificate_of_Destruction_Q3.pdf' successfully uploaded to each of the four target assets.

task_completion.description: Verify that asset HD-DISP-005 remains in its original 'Pending Disposal' status with no files attached.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset list or HD-DISP-005's individual record showing the status 'Pending Disposal' and an empty file attachment section.

task_completion.description: Verify that no other unintended changes were made to the system, such as modifying other assets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ensure that only the four specified target assets have the 'Destroyed - Verified' status or the certificate attached, and no other assets were altered.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the graphical user interface of the asset management system rather than terminal commands or scripts to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the web browser interface of the asset management system being actively used, rather than terminal windows executing database or API commands.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual asset management application and did not mock up the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for consistent UI elements, proper page layouts, and realistic interaction sequences in the application, without signs of developer tools or text editors being used to fake the output.

integrity.description: Verify that the file upload process was genuinely executed through the application's interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for file selection dialogs, upload progress indicators, or the file appearing in the application's native attachment list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target assets to modify are HD-DISP-001, HD-DISP-002, HD-DISP-003, and HD-DISP-004. The control asset that must remain untouched is HD-DISP-005. The expected status label to create is exactly 'Destroyed - Verified' with the type 'Archived'. The file to be uploaded is 'Certificate_of_Destruction_Q3.pdf'.
